## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between GrowthX and Homebase teams to discuss content strategy, project updates, and process improvements for 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has completed 20 glossary pages and 15 programmatic state employment benefits pages, ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Homebase plans to prioritize programmatic SEO content while preparing for a Q1 glossary launch](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [New opportunities discussed: customer profile directory and AI-powered outreach for testimonials/case studies](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Process improvements needed: formalized workflows, regular reporting, and clearer team structure/communication](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Jess Scott introduced as new GrowthX managing editor, bringing 10+ years of marketing experience](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Kerry McCreadie, Homebase content marketing lead, focuses on SEO, website storytelling, and content programs](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

### Content Production Updates

  - [20 glossary pages and 15 programmatic state employment benefits pages completed in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [50-100 existing articles reworked with improved internal linking and intent focus](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Content now available on Webflow staging or live](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

### Content Strategy for 2025

  - [Glossary:](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [Kerry to provide list of 300 target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Develop template for consistent structure (e.g., "What is X", general definition, 2-3 line paragraphs)](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [AI to follow template for initial drafts](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO:](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [Prioritize while waiting for glossary section development](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [Implement checkbox in CMS to hide from UX but allow blog posting](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [New opportunity: Customer profile directory](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Similar to Yelp's business profiles](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Combine with AI outreach for testimonials and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [Potential for backlinks and showcasing Homebase customers](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)

### Web Development Constraints

  - [Limited web dev resources at Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [GrowthX suggests using Webflow tags to create new sections without significant dev work](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Jimmy shared example of Settling's landlord hub built with minimal web resources](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Formalize workflow between teams](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Establish bi-weekly reporting with specific metrics](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Create org chart for clearer communication channels](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Implement "What went out" section in meetings to review published content](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

### Content Quality Feedback

  - [Victoria (Homebase) creating list of pages where:](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
    1.  Content intent doesn't match keyword intent
    2.  Refreshed content uses irrelevant keywords
  - [These will be sent back to GrowthX for review and editing](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kerry to finalize scope document and send to Jimmy and Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide updated org chart and role descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Implement weekly updates on published content, changes, and results](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Kerry to connect Jimmy with Phil S. (Homebase web lead) for low-dev-lift solutions](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [GrowthX to address Victoria's content quality feedback](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Explore implementation of customer profile directory and AI outreach program](https://fathom.video/share/q9nZNsKDaehi2s3aHkpmjMUeCtRhzdbG?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
